tagline: June 22, 2026 The Square connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta.
what_it_does: June 22, 2026 The Square connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta. The connector ingests point of sale data such as payments, orders, customers, catalog items, and inventory from Square into Databricks.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
